name: Lime & Soda
description: A clean, crisp highball that combines Bacardí Lime Flavoured rum with club soda and a lime wheel garnish. For a clean, crisp cocktail, try a BACARDÍ Lime & Soda. Ice-cold sparkling soda water provides the perfect base from which to appreciate the zestiness of the BACARDÍ Lime flavour. A simple and fruitful serve that's a good low-calorie alternative to a vodka soda.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice.
Pour in BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum, followed by club soda.
searchable_text: Lime & Soda main rum BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum A clean, crisp highball that combines Bacardí Lime Flavoured rum with club soda and a lime wheel garnish. For a clean, crisp cocktail, try a BACARDÍ Lime & Soda. Ice-cold sparkling soda water provides the perfect base from which to appreciate the zestiness of the BACARDÍ Lime flavour. A simple and fruitful serve that's a good low-calorie alternative to a vodka soda. ingredients 44 ml BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum, 89 ml Club Soda, cubed ice, lime wheel recipe steps Fill a highball glass with cubed ice. Pour in BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum, followed by club soda. Stir gently. Garnish with a lime wheel.
